title: Job Opening Category Manager at CarTrade Capital India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at CarTrade Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the CarTrade Capital India family as a Category Manager in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CarTrade Capital India:
CarTrade Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarTrade Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
